response.justification: Candidate is a strong full-stack/web software engineer with broad language experience, but the role requires deep hardware-software co-design expertise: SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator performance analysis, GPU/SIMD/MIMD architecture, and deep neural network optimization. The resume shows no evidence of hardware modeling, chip architecture work, DNN optimization, or accelerator-level performance engineering. The brief C/C++ stint at National Instruments and Dlang low-latency work do not approach the silicon-level expertise required for a Principal Performance Architect.
strengths: Strong low-latency systems experience with DLang at Dunnhumby (millions of requests/sec)
Broad multi-language background including C/C++ at National Instruments
Long tenure as senior IC with proven craftsmanship and TDD discipline
concerns: No SoC/IP modeling, RTL, or hardware architecture experience whatsoever
No AI accelerator, GPU architecture, SIMD/MIMD, or DNN optimization background
No PhD/Master's in relevant hardware/CS field; experience is web/product engineering, not silicon performance

key_factors.factor: Missing SoC/IP modeling and hardware co-design experience
No AI accelerator or DNN workload optimization background
